subject: Lafayette Office Arrangements
body:
Brice made suggestions regarding office set up which are set forth  below.  I 
have indicated in Boldface and Caps where I need your input  to make sure you 
are comfortable with the planned arrangements.
 
 
Administrative Office for Construction  
1: As briefly discussed yesterday (4/09/08) if JEE is  comfortable, recommend 
Tom  
Melnick and Arran McGinnis move into the existing construction trailer on  
LSJ.   
ARE YOU OK WITH THIS  PLAN?  
2: Set up the ballet room as a construction office  for Bill Rowels, Monique 
and any  
other  visitors i.e. Doug Schoettle, Charles Miller 
3: Have already  asked Lance to investigate phone issues, believe only need 
hand  sets 
as all data and phone cable are in place.  
4: The Ballet  room had already been set up for past design teams, with a 
desk  top 
computer and  plotter. 
5: The  conference room at FTC would be utilized to meet sub contractors and 
vendors  
when needed. 
ARE YOU OK WITH USING THE BALLET ROOM AS BRICE SUGGESTS  ABOVE? 
In addition, Cecile told me that there is space for Monique at FTC.   I 
understood you to tell me that Monique should be stationed at FTC.  I  assume that 
she would use Ballet room (if you approve of the use of the Ballet  room as 
Brice suggests) as and when Monique's responsibilities call her to the  Island 
from time to time.  ARE YOU OK WITH THIS  PLAN? 
Based on our brief conversation, I told Cecile to make sure there is  space 
for Bill Rowles at FTC as well, but would you rather that he be stationed  at 
FTC, and use the Ballet Room when he needs to come to the Island, or would  you 
rather Bill be permanently stationed on the Island?  (I understand that  we 
still need to evaluate Bill, but in the meantime, want to make sure that he  is 
stationed in a manner acceptable to you.)  PLEASE ADVISE WHETHER  YOU WANT 
BILL TO STATIONED AT FTC, USING BALLET ROOM WHEN HE NEEDS TO BE ON  ISLAND, OR 
TO BE STATIONED ON THE ISLAND, USING SPACE AND THE CONFERENCE ROOM AT  FTC, 
WHEN THE NEED ARISES?.   
I have asked Brice to get me details of the files, books, equipment to be  
brought over from the Lafayette office, so we can determine the extent to which  
it should be brought to the Island or kept at FTC.  I will report to you on  
that as soon as I hear from Brice.
 
Darren K.  Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New  York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: _dkiesq@aol.com_ (mailto:dkiesq@aol.com) 

------------------------------

written to be used, and cannot be used, for the purpose of avoiding U.S.

in  this email. Each taxpayer should seek advice based on the taxpayer's

body_html:
Brice made suggestions regarding office set up which are set forth below.  I have indicated in Boldface and Caps where I need your input to make sure you are comfortable with the planned arrangements.
 

Administrative Office for Construction

1: As briefly discussed yesterday (4/09/08) if JEE is comfortable, recommend Tom

    Melnick and Arran McGinnis move into the existing construction trailer on LSJ.  

   ARE YOU OK WITH THIS PLAN? 

 

2: Set up the ballet room as a construction office for Bill Rowels, Monique and any

   other visitors i.e. Doug Schoettle, Charles Miller

 

      3: Have already asked Lance to investigate phone issues, believe only need hand sets

          as all data and phone cable are in place.

 

      4: The Ballet room had already been set up for past design teams, with a desk top

          computer and plotter.

 

      5: The conference room at FTC would be utilized to meet sub contractors and vendors

          when needed.

 

ARE YOU OK WITH USING THE BALLET ROOM AS BRICE SUGGESTS ABOVE?

 

In addition, Cecile told me that there is space for Monique at FTC.  I understood you to tell me that Monique should be stationed at FTC.  I assume that she would use Ballet room (if you approve of the use of the Ballet room as Brice suggests) as and when Monique's responsibilities call her to the Island from time to time.  ARE YOU OK WITH THIS PLAN?

 

Based on our brief conversation, I told Cecile to make sure there is space for Bill Rowles at FTC as well, but would you rather that he be stationed at FTC, and use the Ballet Room when he needs to come to the Island, or would you rather Bill be permanently stationed on the Island?  (I understand that we still need to evaluate Bill, but in the meantime, want to make sure that he is stationed in a manner acceptable to you.)  PLEASE ADVISE WHETHER YOU WANT BILL TO STATIONED AT FTC, USING BALLET ROOM WHEN HE NEEDS TO BE ON ISLAND, OR TO BE STATIONED ON THE ISLAND, USING SPACE AND THE CONFERENCE ROOM AT FTC, WHEN THE NEED ARISES?. 

 

I have asked Brice to get me details of the files, books, equipment to be brought over from the Lafayette office, so we can determine the extent to which it should be brought to the Island or kept at FTC.  I will report to you on that as soon as I hear from Brice.

 
Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: dkiesq@aol.com
